title: Dockerfile plus docker-compose axiomchat-app service
description: Add a multi-stage Dockerfile for AxiomChat building the SPA and server into a slim runtime, and an axiomchat-app service in docker-compose on port 3100 with a healthcheck, AXIOM_AXIOMCHAT_APP_URL wiring and axiom depends_on.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose up axiomchat-app is healthy on 3100; axiom reaches it.

title: AxiomChat task YAMLs (post_message, reply_in_thread, react)
description: Add at least three tasks under tasks/axiomchat using existing goal types element_count, text_content_matches and custom_js to prove agent interaction. No reward or oracle machinery.
acceptance_criteria: At least three tasks load and run with existing goal types.

title: Register axiomchat env in _create_registry
description: Register AxiomChatEnvironment as axiomchat in axiom/api/app.py _create_registry.
acceptance_criteria: GET /envs lists axiomchat; a session can be created on it.

title: AxiomChatEnvironment subclass plus _reset_server hook and readiness wait
description: Create axiom/envs/axiomchat_env.py subclassing WebAppEnvironment. Refactor a small _reset_server hook in webapp_env.py where the base returns empty and the subclass returns seed and scale. Override the post-navigation wait to wait for the data-app-ready selector. Set env_id to axiomchat.
acceptance_criteria: Seed passed in reset body; env waits on data-app-ready; env_id is axiomchat; existing webapp tests still pass.

title: Config: axiomchat_app_url and oracle token
description: Add axiomchat_app_url and axiomchat_oracle_token to AxiomSettings with the AXIOM_ env prefix and sensible defaults such as http://localhost:3100.
acceptance_criteria: AXIOM_AXIOMCHAT env vars resolve; defaults set.

title: Add TaskConfig seed and scale fields (models.py)
description: Add optional seed and scale fields to TaskConfig in axiom/models.py using Pydantic v2 patterns, defaulting to None.
acceptance_criteria: Fields added; a seeded task config loads and validates.

title: Thread right-pane (replies, reply composer, resolve)
description: Build the thread right pane: root message, replies, a reply composer and a resolve action. Stable testids.
acceptance_criteria: Thread opens; replies render; testids thread-pane, reply-input, reply-send and resolve-thread present.

title: Composer with mention autocomplete and send
description: Build the message composer: auto-grow textarea, at-mention autocomplete, emoji, channel selector, send on Enter and newline on Shift plus Enter. Stable testids.
acceptance_criteria: Enter sends and Shift plus Enter newlines; testids message-input, send-button, channel-select and mention present.

title: Message list and MessageRow (grouping, avatars, hover toolbar, reactions, thread indicator)
description: Build the message list with author grouping, colored-initial avatars, timestamps, day dividers, a hover action toolbar, reaction pills, mention highlighting and a thread indicator. Stable testids on messages and actions.
acceptance_criteria: Renders grouped messages; testids message, message-text, react, thread-open and pin present.

title: Sidebar (channels, DMs, unread, presence)
description: Build the sidebar: workspace header, search box, Channels and Direct Messages sections, channel items with active and unread states and count badges, and presence dots. Stable data-testid on each item.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar renders; active highlight and unread badges work; testids channel-link, dm-link and unread present.

title: App shell: 3-pane responsive layout plus hash router
description: Implement the 3-pane Slack shell of sidebar, main and right pane, and a hash router for channel, dm and search routes.
acceptance_criteria: Responsive 3-pane layout; routes for channel, dm and search work.

title: Frontend state and data layer (hydrate from /api/state)
description: Build a single source-of-truth store that hydrates from /api/state with action helpers for post, patch, react, pin and resolve. No Date.now or Math.random in render.
acceptance_criteria: Store renders purely from server state; action helpers work; no nondeterminism in render.

title: Frontend scaffold: React+Vite+TS+Tailwind, tokens, data-app-ready
description: Scaffold the React app under apps/axiomchat/web with Vite, TypeScript and Tailwind. Define design tokens for color, type, spacing, radius, shadow and motion. Build to web/dist served by Express. Set a data-app-ready true marker after first render and data load.
acceptance_criteria: vite build produces dist served by Express; Tailwind tokens defined; readiness marker set after data load.

title: Privileged GET /api/_oracle/state (token-gated)
description: Implement GET /api/_oracle/state returning full state including hidden underscore labels and derived ground-truth answers, gated behind an X-Oracle-Token header read from env.
acceptance_criteria: Returns full state and labels only with a valid token; 403 without.

title: POST /api/reset with seed and scale (deterministic re-seed)
description: Implement POST /api/reset accepting seed and scale and re-seeding the in-memory workspace deterministically via the seeding engine.
acceptance_criteria: Reset re-seeds; same seed twice yields identical /api/state.

title: Public REST API (state, channels, messages, threads, search, CRUD)
description: Implement GET /api/state which must strip all underscore-prefixed fields, plus channels, channel messages, thread messages, POST messages, PATCH message for react, pin, resolve and edit, and POST search.
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints work; /api/state never leaks underscore fields.

title: Deterministic seeding engine (mulberry32, seedWorkspace)
description: Add a seeded PRNG (mulberry32) and seedWorkspace(seed, scale) that generates realistic users, channels, threads and messages. Timestamps are derived from the seed, never Date.now. Populate hidden ground-truth labels per scenario.
acceptance_criteria: Same seed yields identical state; different seed differs; timestamps deterministic; hidden labels populated.

title: Domain model and TS types (User, Channel, Message)
description: Define TypeScript types: User; Channel with kind public, private or dm; Message with threadRootId, mentions, reactions, pinned and resolved; plus hidden underscore-prefixed ground-truth label fields such as isQuestion, answerFacts, correctAssignee, summaryFacts and severity.
acceptance_criteria: Types compile; message supports threads, reactions, mentions, pin and resolved; hidden label fields present.

title: Backend scaffold: apps/axiomchat Express+TS server on port 3100
description: Clone the apps/todo-app skeleton into apps/axiomchat: Express plus TypeScript server, in-memory store, static serving of the React build at web/dist, and GET /api/health. Internal port 3000, exposed as 3100.
acceptance_criteria: Server boots; GET /api/health returns ok; serves a placeholder web/dist.

title: Pillar 1 - AxiomChat: a world-class Slack training environment
description: Deliver the AxiomChat Slack environment: a React+Vite+TS+Tailwind client-side SPA plus an Express+TypeScript backend, deterministic seeding, a privileged oracle endpoint, and the AxiomChatEnvironment Python integration as the 4th axiom env. The proxy/oracle reward machinery is Pillar 2 and is NOT in scope here.
acceptance_criteria: AxiomChat runs, is deterministic and resettable, exposes a token-gated /api/_oracle/state, and is registered and drivable as the axiomchat env; all 108 existing tests still pass.

title: Create agents/claude_agent.py — Claude vision agent
description: httpx.AsyncClient for async HTTP. Vision: sends screenshots as base64 images + DOM as text. Retry on invalid JSON (one retry with correction prompt). Conversation history: last 3 observation-action pairs. Cost tracking: log input/output tokens, total per episode. Configurable model (claude-sonnet-4-20250514 default). Carefully crafted system prompt per env type.

title: Create axiom/envs/webapp_env.py — WebAppEnvironment
description: Per-session BrowserContext (isolated cookies/storage). reset() calls /api/reset on todo app (resets BOTH client and server state — blueprint misses this). wait_for_load_state('networkidle') instead of timeout. Action execution: click (selector-based + coordinate-based), type (fill), press_key, select, scroll. Action timeout 5s. Goal checks: elements_exist, text_content_matches, element_count, custom_js. Partial accuracy for incomplete tasks (RL reward shaping). @register_env('webapp').

title: Phase 7: WebApp environment — Playwright (THE centerpiece)
description: Playwright-powered browser environment mirroring Deeptune's OSWorld. Real web app in Docker, agent observes via screenshots + DOM tree, interacts via click/type/press_key. Per-session BrowserContext for isolation, server state reset on env reset, hybrid observations, 4 goal check types, partial accuracy scoring. THIS IS THE PROJECT'S STAR COMPONENT.

title: Phase 4: FastAPI server & REST API
description: REST API exposing the environment framework over HTTP. Application factory pattern with lifespan management. Separate API schemas from domain models. Request ID middleware with structlog correlation. After this phase, interact with environments via curl.

title: Phase 3: JSON environment (first concrete env)
description: Simplest possible concrete environment — validates entire core framework end-to-end before Playwright complexity. Pure Python state machine with in-memory dict state, API_CALL actions, JSON observations, and state-based goal checking.

title: Phase 2: Core framework — base env, registry, session, trajectory
description: Abstract machinery that makes environments pluggable and sessions manageable. BaseEnvironment ABC with async context manager, EnvironmentRegistry with decorator pattern, SessionManager with async locks, TrajectoryRecorder with separated screenshots, Evaluator protocol, TaskLoader for YAML.

title: Phase 1: Core data models, config & logging
description: Define every data type the system uses — the vocabulary layer. Pydantic models with validators, pydantic-settings for config, structlog for logging, custom exception hierarchy. No logic — just types. Forces domain thinking before behavior.

title: Phase 0: Project scaffold & tooling
description: Set up the foundational project structure: pyproject.toml, .gitignore, .env.example, Makefile, package directory structure (axiom/, tests/, agents/, tasks/, trajectories/, scripts/). Configure ruff, mypy strict, pytest-asyncio. This is the first impression — when a Deeptune engineer clones the repo, they should immediately see professional tooling.

title: Makefile and build wiring
description: Add make targets to build the AxiomChat SPA and server via vite build and tsc and run it locally, and document usage.
acceptance_criteria: make target builds SPA and server; documented.

title: Integration test: agent completes an AxiomChat task
description: Add a marked integration test that runs the Claude agent or scripted actions against a running AxiomChat to complete a task such as posting a message.
acceptance_criteria: Agent posts a message; goal met; trajectory saved.

title: Python unit tests for AxiomChatEnvironment
description: Add unit tests for seed passed in reset body, registration, and TaskConfig seed validation, plus conftest fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Tests pass; fixtures added.

title: Determinism and Playwright reliability hardening
description: Ensure rendering is purely state-driven, disable nondeterministic animations for screenshots, and confirm the data-app-ready gating works under Playwright.
acceptance_criteria: Animations off for screenshots; state-only render; data-app-ready gating verified.

title: World-class polish pass (transitions, focus, empty states, a11y)
description: Polish pass for a real-product feel: hover and focus transitions, focus rings, empty states, an unread divider, refined dark theme, and semantic roles and aria-labels.
acceptance_criteria: Screenshot-worthy; semantic roles and aria present; visual QA passes.

title: Reactions, pins, search results and DM views
description: Implement reaction toggling, pinning, the search results view and the DM view. Stable testids.
acceptance_criteria: React toggle, pin, search-input and search-result, and DM view all work.

title: Backend tests (vitest): determinism, no-leak, CRUD
description: Add backend tests for seeding determinism, the no-underscore-leak guarantee on /api/state, and CRUD correctness.
acceptance_criteria: Determinism, leak and CRUD tests pass.

title: Trajectory Replay Web UI
description:
No way to visually inspect agent behavior. Essential for debugging and makes incredible demo content. Build a single self-contained HTML file served by FastAPI.

## Implementation
- NEW static/replay.html: Self-contained HTML/CSS/JS (no build step). Step-through viewer with screenshot/state panel, action display, reward tracking, evaluation bar charts. Arrow keys for nav, space for auto-play, speed control. Dark theme, professional design, responsive layout.
- axiom/api/app.py: Mount StaticFiles for /static and /trajectories directories
- axiom/api/routes/ (new or existing): Add GET /trajectories/saved endpoint to list saved trajectories on disk
- Tests: Verify HTML exists, test /trajectories/saved endpoint

## Acceptance Criteria
- Replay UI loads at http://localhost:8000/static/replay.html?session=<id>
- Step-through navigation works (prev/next/auto-play)
- Screenshots displayed for webapp trajectories, text output for CLI
- Evaluation scores shown with visual bar charts
- Trajectory list endpoint returns all saved trajectories
- make check passes clean

title: Parallel Episode Runner
description:
Benchmark runs sequentially. At training scale, you need thousands of episodes running concurrently. Build asyncio.Semaphore-based parallel execution with progress tracking and error isolation.

## Implementation
- NEW axiom/core/parallel_runner.py: ParallelRunner class with EpisodeConfig, EpisodeResult, bounded concurrency via asyncio.Semaphore, progress callbacks, error isolation per episode
- NEW scripts/parallel_benchmark.py: CLI script with --concurrency N, --envs, --agent flags. Live progress printing. Final summary table with per-agent aggregates (mean, std)
- NEW tests/test_parallel_runner.py: Tests for concurrency limiting, error isolation, result completeness

## Acceptance Criteria
- ParallelRunner respects max_concurrency semaphore
- Failed episodes don't crash the batch (error captured in result)
- parallel_benchmark.py produces formatted comparison table
- All trajectories saved for completed episodes
- make check passes clean

title: LLM-as-Judge Evaluator
description:
Current evaluation is rule-based only (DOM inspection, file checks). Can't evaluate subjective tasks like 'write a professional README'. Evaluation quality is THE bottleneck for RL training.

## Implementation
- NEW axiom/core/llm_judge.py: LLMJudgeEvaluator using AsyncAnthropic, rubric-based structured scoring
- axiom/core/evaluator.py: Add CompositeEvaluator (weighted combination of evaluators)
- axiom/models.py: Add llm_evaluation field to TaskConfig
- axiom/config.py: Add llm_judge_model + llm_judge_enabled settings
- axiom/api/routes/sessions.py: Wire composite evaluation when task has llm_evaluation config
- NEW tasks/cli/write_readme.yaml: LLM-judged task
- NEW tasks/cli/organize_project.yaml: LLM-judged task
- NEW tests/test_llm_judge.py: Tests with mocked Anthropic client

## Acceptance Criteria
- LLMJudgeEvaluator produces valid EvaluationResult via Claude API
- CompositeEvaluator correctly weighted-averages multiple evaluators
- Tasks with llm_evaluation config trigger composite evaluation when enabled
- All tests pass with mocked Anthropic (no real API calls in tests)
- make check passes clean

title: Wire Trajectory Persistence
description:
TrajectoryRecorder.save() exists but is never called anywhere. Trajectories vanish when sessions are deleted. Wire save() into evaluate_session and delete_session endpoints. Add evaluation field to Trajectory model. This is the foundation — Features 1-3 depend on trajectories being saved to disk.

## Changes Required
- axiom/models.py: Add evaluation field to Trajectory model
- axiom/core/trajectory.py: Add set_evaluation() method, include evaluation in save() output
- axiom/api/routes/sessions.py: Call save() in evaluate_session + defensive save in delete_session
- tests/test_core.py: Add trajectory evaluation tests
- tests/test_api.py: Verify trajectory file written after evaluate

## Acceptance Criteria
- Running a demo saves trajectory.json + screenshots/ to trajectories/ dir
- Evaluation scores are included in the saved trajectory JSON
- replay_trajectory.py script works with saved data
- All existing tests still pass

title: Ship Week: Advanced Features for axiom-ai
description: Ship 4 features that close real gaps in the framework: trajectory persistence, LLM-as-judge evaluation, parallel execution, and trajectory replay UI. Each maps to a real problem at scale: data pipelines, evaluation quality, throughput, and observability.

title: Write professional README.md
description: One-liner description. Architecture diagram (ASCII). Quick start (make docker-up && python scripts/run_demo.py --all). How it works (3 paragraphs). Environment types table. Evaluation metrics table. Task config YAML example. Project structure tree. Development setup. Design decisions section (articulates WHY). Relation to OSWorld/Terminal-Bench.

title: Final integration test & cleanup
description: Fresh clone test: make install && make check passes. docker-compose up works. Demo script runs end-to-end. All test files pass. Remove any dead code or unused files. Clean git history with meaningful commits.

title: Phase 11: Demo scripts & benchmarking
description: Scripts that produce impressive terminal output for interviews/README. run_demo.py with pretty Unicode bar charts, benchmark.py with Claude vs Random comparison table, replay_trajectory.py for step-by-step replay.

title: Create Dockerfile for axiom server
description: Base: python:3.11-slim. Install Playwright system deps + chromium. Multi-stage build. Run as non-root user. HEALTHCHECK CMD curl -f http://localhost:8000/health. Entrypoint: uvicorn axiom.api.app:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000.

title: Create docker-compose.yml — full orchestration
description: Services: todo-app (build ./apps/todo-app, port 3000, health check), axiom (build ., port 8000, depends_on todo-app healthy, env from .env, volume mounts for tasks/ and trajectories/). Shared network. todo-app accessed as http://todo-app:3000 via Docker DNS.

title: Phase 10: Docker orchestration
description: Full docker-compose up brings up todo app + axiom server with health checks, proper networking, volume mounts. Multi-stage Dockerfiles, non-root user, inter-container communication via Docker DNS.

title: Phase 9: Claude agent + random agent
description: AI agents that interact with the framework via HTTP API. Claude agent uses vision (screenshots) + DOM to decide actions. Random agent as baseline for comparison. Shows the agent-environment loop in action.

title: Create axiom/envs/cli_env.py — CLIEnvironment
description: ALLOWED_COMMANDS: ls, cat, head, tail, grep, find, wc, mkdir, touch, cp, mv, rm, echo, sort, uniq, cut, awk, sed, pwd, tree, diff, chmod, stat, basename, dirname, xargs, tr, tee. FULL command safety: blocks path traversal (..), dangerous redirects. Sanitized env vars. Command timeout 10s. Observation: last output + dir listing + exit code. Goals: files_in_directory, file_content_matches, directory_structure, command_output_matches. @register_env('cli').

title: Phase 8: CLI environment (Terminal-Bench analog)
description: Subprocess-based terminal environment mapping to Deeptune's Terminal-Bench. Sandboxed temp directory, command allowlisting with FULL command inspection (not just first word), path traversal blocking, expanded allowed commands, filesystem-based goal checking.

title: Create axiom/utils/dom_parser.py — SimplifiedDOMParser
description: HTMLParser subclass. INTERACTIVE_TAGS (input, button, a, select, textarea, label), SEMANTIC_TAGS (h1-h4, p, li, span, div, form), SKIP_TAGS (script, style, meta, link, head, noscript, svg). Preserves important attrs (id, class, type, placeholder, value, href, name, role, aria-label, checked, disabled, data-testid). max_depth param, token count estimation with warning >4000 tokens, text truncation at 100 chars.

title: Phase 6: DOM parser & screenshot utilities
description: Convert raw HTML into token-efficient simplified DOM tree for LLM consumption. Critical for agent observation pipeline — raw HTML wastes context window on script/style tags. Also screenshot save/encode/resize utilities.

title: Create apps/todo-app/public/ — frontend HTML/CSS/JS
description: index.html with data-testid on every interactive element (todo-form, todo-input, add-button, todo-list, todo-item-{id}, toggle-{id}, todo-text-{id}, delete-{id}, stats). styles.css for clean layout. app.js with loadTodos, renderTodos, form submit handler, toggleTodo, deleteTodo.

title: Create apps/todo-app/Dockerfile & package.json & tsconfig.json
description: Multi-stage Dockerfile: build TypeScript (node:20-slim) -> run compiled JS. package.json with express, typescript, @types/express, @types/node. tsconfig.json targeting ES2020, outDir=dist. HEALTHCHECK CMD curl -f http://localhost:3000/api/health.

title: Create apps/todo-app/server.ts — Express TypeScript server
description: TypeScript Express server with Todo interface. Endpoints: GET/POST /api/todos, PATCH/DELETE /api/todos/:id, POST /api/reset (clears state — crucial for env resets), GET /api/health. In-memory store (resets on restart = perfect for RL). Request validation: reject empty titles.

title: Phase 5: Todo web app (TypeScript + Express)
description: Real web application the WebApp environment automates. TypeScript Express server with REST API, HTML/CSS/JS frontend, Docker container. Includes /api/reset for env resets, /api/health for Docker health checks, data-testid attributes throughout for Playwright selectors.

title: Create axiom/api/routes/ — all route modules
description: sessions.py: POST /sessions, POST /sessions/{id}/step, GET /sessions/{id}/observe, POST /sessions/{id}/evaluate, GET /sessions/{id}/trajectory, DELETE /sessions/{id}. environments.py: GET /envs. tasks.py: GET /tasks. health.py: GET /health (status, active_sessions, registered_envs, uptime).

title: Create axiom/api/app.py — FastAPI application factory
description: create_app()->FastAPI. Use lifespan async context manager (not deprecated on_event). On startup: configure logging, create SessionManager, load task configs. On shutdown: close all sessions. Register all route modules. Include CORS middleware for local dev.

title: Create axiom/api/schemas.py — API request/response models
description: API-specific models SEPARATE from domain models. CreateSessionRequest(env_name, task_id), CreateSessionResponse(session_id, observation), StepRequest(type, selector, value, params), StepResponse(observation, reward, terminated, truncated, info), EvaluateResponse(scores, trajectory_saved).

title: Create axiom/api/middleware.py — request ID & error handling
description: Request ID middleware: generates UUID per request, binds to structlog context. Exception handler: catches AxiomError subtypes -> appropriate HTTP status codes (404 for SessionError, 422 for TaskConfigError, 500 for EnvironmentError). All errors return structured JSON.

title: Create axiom/envs/json_env.py — JSONEnvironment
description: Pure Python state machine. In-memory state: {'todos': []}. Operations via API_CALL: add_todo, complete_todo, delete_todo. Observation returns state as JSON. Goal checking inspects state dict (element_count). Uses @register_env('json') decorator. Implements full BaseEnvironment contract including async context manager.

title: Create axiom/core/base_env.py — BaseEnvironment ABC
description: Abstract base with __aenter__/__aexit__ for guaranteed cleanup. _ready flag (step/observe raise EnvironmentNotReady if reset not called). Base class enforces max_steps truncation. Abstract methods: reset()->Observation, step(Action)->StepResult, observe()->Observation, evaluate()->dict, cleanup(). Abstract property: env_id. Follows Gymnasium reset/step interface.

title: Create axiom/core/registry.py — EnvironmentRegistry
description: Dict-based registry. Methods: register(env_id, env_class), create(env_id, TaskConfig)->BaseEnvironment, list_envs()->list[str], get_env_class(env_id)->type. @register_decorator(env_id) class decorator for clean registration. Raises TaskConfigError for unknown env_id.

title: Create axiom/core/session.py — SessionManager
description: Manages active sessions. create_session(env_id, task_id, config)->Session, get_session(session_id)->Session (raises SessionError), close_session(session_id) (calls env.cleanup), close_expired(). Session IDs: uuid4().hex[:12]. asyncio.Lock for thread safety. Session dataclass: id, env, created_at, last_active.

title: Create axiom/core/trajectory.py — TrajectoryRecorder
description: start_session(session_id, task_name, env_type). record_step(session_id, step_num, action, observation, reward, terminated, truncated). save(session_id, trajectory_dir)->Path: writes trajectory.json (no base64) + screenshots/step_N.png (decoded separately). get_trajectory(session_id)->Trajectory. Key: never store 50MB base64 in JSON.

title: Create axiom/core/task_loader.py — YAML task loading
description: TaskLoader class. load_task(env_type, task_id)->TaskConfig: reads tasks/{env_type}/{task_id}.yaml, validates with Pydantic. list_tasks()->list[TaskConfig]: scans all YAML files. list_tasks_for_env(env_id)->list[TaskConfig]: filtered. Uses functools.lru_cache for repeated loads.

title: Create axiom/models.py — all Pydantic data models
description: ObservationMode enum, ActionType enum, Action (with model_validator: click requires selector, type requires value, run_command requires value), Observation, StepResult, TaskConfig (strongly typed from YAML), GoalConfig (discriminated union by type field), EvaluationResult (scores 0-1 with validators), TrajectoryStep, Trajectory.

title: Create axiom/config.py — pydantic-settings configuration
description: AxiomSettings using pydantic_settings.BaseSettings with env_prefix=AXIOM_. Fields: host, port, log_level, log_format (json|console), todo_app_url, screenshot_dir, trajectory_dir, max_session_age_seconds. Loads from .env file.

title: Create axiom/exceptions.py — exception hierarchy
description: AxiomError (base) -> EnvironmentError (BrowserError, CommandError, EnvironmentNotReady), TaskConfigError, SessionError, EvaluationError. Never raise bare Exception in core code.

title: Create pyproject.toml with hatchling build, dependencies, ruff/mypy/pytest config
description: Define build system (hatchling), core deps (fastapi, playwright, pydantic, structlog, pyyaml, uvicorn, httpx, anthropic), dev deps (ruff, mypy, pytest, pytest-asyncio). Configure ruff (line-length 100, Python 3.11+), mypy strict mode, pytest-asyncio.

title: Create Makefile with dev targets
description: Targets: install, dev, lint, format, typecheck, test, test-integration, check (runs lint+typecheck+test), docker-up, docker-down.

title: Create axiom package skeleton
description: Create axiom/__init__.py (version, public exports), axiom/py.typed (PEP 561), axiom/core/__init__.py, axiom/envs/__init__.py, axiom/api/__init__.py, axiom/utils/__init__.py, agents/__init__.py, tasks/.gitkeep, trajectories/.gitkeep, scripts/.gitkeep.

title: Demo screenshot or GIF for README
description: Capture a polished screenshot or short GIF of AxiomChat and embed it in the README as the world-class proof.
acceptance_criteria: Polished asset embedded in README.

title: Docs: README env table, CLAUDE.md, app README
description: Update the README environment table and CLAUDE.md architecture to include the 4th env, and add apps/axiomchat/README.md documenting the seed, reset and oracle endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: Fourth env documented; seed, reset and oracle endpoints described.

title: Phase 12: Final polish — README, tests, CI
description: Everything a Deeptune engineer needs to clone the repo and be impressed in 60 seconds. Professional README with architecture diagram, quick start, design decisions. Optional GitHub Actions CI. Ensure all tests pass with comprehensive coverage.

title: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml
description: GitHub Actions: Python 3.11 matrix. Jobs: lint (ruff), typecheck (mypy --strict), test (pytest, excluding integration). Runs on push to main and PRs.

title: Create scripts/run_demo.py — demo runner
description: Takes --env and --task flags (or --all). Pretty-prints each step with action, reward, running total. Evaluation scores with Unicode block bar charts. Saves trajectory. Produces the output you'd show in an interview.

title: Create scripts/benchmark.py — agent comparison
description: Runs all tasks with Claude agent and random agent. Produces markdown-formatted comparison table. Calculates aggregate scores per agent. Shows Claude significantly outperforms random — evaluation credibility signal.

title: Create agents/base_agent.py — BaseAgent protocol
description: Protocol class: async decide_action(observation: dict) -> dict, async run_episode(env_name: str, task_id: str) -> EvaluationResult.

title: Create agents/random_agent.py — random baseline
description: Random action sampling. For webapp: picks from known data-testid selectors in DOM. For CLI: picks from allowed commands with random file args. Exists purely for baseline comparison to show Claude's scores are meaningfully better.

title: Create CLI task YAML configs
description: tasks/cli/organize_files.yaml (6 files, create images/docs/code dirs, move by extension, directory_structure goal). tasks/cli/find_and_extract.yaml (text processing task with file_content_matches goal).

title: Create webapp task YAML configs
description: tasks/webapp/add_three_todos.yaml (element_count goal, optimal 6 steps), tasks/webapp/complete_all_todos.yaml (custom_js goal with setup_actions), tasks/webapp/edit_and_delete.yaml.

title: Create axiom/utils/screenshot.py — screenshot utilities
description: save_screenshot(base64_data, path)->Path: decodes and saves PNG. encode_screenshot(path)->str: loads and encodes to base64. resize_screenshot(base64_data, max_width=1280)->str: reduces payload size for Claude API vision token costs.

title: Create axiom/envs/__init__.py — environment registration
description: Import all env modules so @register_env decorators fire on import. Initially just: from axiom.envs import json_env. Later add webapp_env and cli_env imports.

title: Create tasks/json/create_and_complete.yaml
description: YAML task config: name, env=json, description, observation_mode=json, max_steps=10, optimal_steps, goal with type=element_count. First task definition to validate TaskLoader.

title: Create axiom/core/evaluator.py — Evaluator protocol
description: Evaluator protocol: async evaluate(env: BaseEnvironment) -> EvaluationResult. DefaultEvaluator implementation that calls env.evaluate() and wraps in EvaluationResult. Protocol allows future extension (LLM-as-judge, composite evaluators).

title: Create axiom/logging.py — structlog configuration
description: configure_logging() function. Dev mode (LOG_FORMAT=console): colorful, human-readable. Production (LOG_FORMAT=json): JSON lines. Processors: timestamp, log level, caller info, session_id context variable. Every log line from within a session includes session_id automatically.

title: Create .env.example with documented env vars
description: Document: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, AXIOM_TODO_APP_URL, AXIOM_LOG_LEVEL, AXIOM_LOG_FORMAT (json|console), AXIOM_HOST, AXIOM_PORT, AXIOM_SCREENSHOT_DIR, AXIOM_TRAJECTORY_DIR.
